fields.title: Include approvalTimeoutSeconds in sandbox notice text
fields.description:
buildSandboxNotice in sandbox-change.ts skips approvalTimeoutSeconds from the notice text, but includes it in the hash computation (computeSandboxConfigHash). A timeout-only change triggers a hash diff and notification, but the text looks identical to the previous notice -- confusing the agent.

Fix: Include approvalTimeoutSeconds in buildSandboxStateNoticeText output.

Key file: extensions/tau/src/sandbox/sandbox-change.ts (buildSandboxNotice / buildSandboxStateNoticeText)

Run npm run gate in extensions/tau/ when done.
fields.notes: Implemented in extensions/tau/src/sandbox/sandbox-change.ts: sandbox notice text now includes timeout token (timeout=<approvalTimeoutSeconds>s) for both SANDBOX_STATE and SANDBOX_CHANGE notices via shared buildSandboxNotice. Ran npm run gate in extensions/tau. Typecheck/lint passed (warnings only), tests failed in prompt-modes-session-start (tracked separately as tau-2bq).
fields.close_reason: Added approvalTimeoutSeconds to sandbox notice text
